title: Bump containers/storage and containers/image
body: Re-vendor containers/storage to current master (0d32dfce498e06c132c60dac945081bf44c22464), and containers/image to current master (c8bcd6aa11c62637c5a7da1420f43dd6a15f0e8d).

comments.body:
LGTM
Is this worthy of another skopeo package?
I'm not sure we're waiting on anything in here specifically.  My main goal here was to pick up the new `ImagesByDigest()` method in the storage library's Store object.
